zh.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas De Burton是Roger DeBurton和Mrs de Burton的兒子，於1250年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。他於大約1270年與Aliscia Codarcote在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1270年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas De Burton是Roger DeBurton和Mrs de Burton的儿子，于1250年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾。他于大约1270年与Aliscia Codarcote在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1270年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas De Burton was born in 1250, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Roger DeBurton and Mrs de Burton. He married Aliscia Codarcote about 1270, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1270, in his hometown.

Il a épousé Aliscia Codarcote environ 1270, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1270, dans sa ville natale.

ja.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Burtonは1250年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでRoger DeBurtonとMrs de Burtonの息子として生まれた。約1270年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンでAliscia Codarcoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1270年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Burton(은)는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Roger DeBurton(와)과 Mrs de Burton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 Aliscia Codarcote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Thomas De Burton родился в 1250 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Roger DeBurton и Mrs de Burton. Он женился на женщине по имени Aliscia Codarcote около 1270 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1270 г. в его родном городе.
